gear.name: Thermapen ONE
gear.description: Instant-read thermometer — reads in 1 second. The gold standard for BBQ.

gear.name: MEATER+
gear.description: Wireless smart probe — monitor from your phone up to 50m away.

gear.name: ThermoWorks Smoke
gear.description: Dual-probe remote thermometer — monitor pit and meat simultaneously.

gear.name: Inkbird IBT-4XS
gear.description: Bluetooth 4-probe thermometer — great value for multi-protein cooks.

gear.name: Weber Smokey Mountain 18"
gear.description: The classic water smoker. Reliable, affordable, beloved by competition pitmasters.

gear.name: Weber Kettle 57cm
gear.description: The iconic charcoal kettle — grilling, smoking, roasting all in one.

gear.name: Big Green Egg (Large)
gear.description: The original kamado — retains heat like nothing else. Built to last a lifetime.

gear.name: Pit Barrel Cooker
gear.description: Drum smoker — incredibly simple, produces outstanding smoke flavour.

gear.name: Napoleon PRO 500
gear.description: Premium gas grill with infrared sear zone and smoker tray.

gear.name: Weber Briquettes 8kg
gear.description: Long-burn briquettes — consistent heat, low ash. Perfect for low-and-slow.

gear.name: Jealous Devil Lump Charcoal
gear.description: Premium hardwood lump — burns hotter and cleaner than briquettes.

gear.name: Weber Hickory Wood Chunks
gear.description: Hickory chunks for bold smoky flavour. Great with beef and pork.

gear.name: Weber Apple Wood Chips
gear.description: Mild, sweet smoke — ideal for chicken, fish, and pork.

gear.name: Weber Fire Starters (50pk)
gear.description: Odourless, reliable fire starters. Never use lighter fluid again.

gear.name: Killer Hogs The BBQ Rub
gear.description: Championship-winning rub — the benchmark for competition-style BBQ flavour.

gear.name: Meat Church Holy Gospel
gear.description: All-purpose BBQ rub — sweet heat with a Tex-Mex influence.

gear.name: Lane's BBQ Signature Blend
gear.description: Savoury-sweet blend — works on everything from brisket to veggies.

gear.name: Maldon Sea Salt Flakes
gear.description: Finishing salt for steaks and grilled proteins — a little goes a long way.

gear.name: Weber Chimney Starter
gear.description: Light charcoal in 15 minutes — no lighter fluid, no mess.

gear.name: RAPICCA BBQ Gloves (932°F)
gear.description: Heat-resistant gloves rated to 500°C — pull pork bare-handed like a pro.

gear.name: SpitJack Magnum Meat Injector
gear.description: Professional-grade injector — marinades deep into thick cuts like brisket and shoulder.

gear.name: OXO Silicone Basting Brush
gear.description: Silicone bristles hold sauce perfectly — dishwasher safe.

gear.name: Teakhaus XL Teak Cutting Board
gear.description: Extra-large teak board — perfect for resting and slicing whole briskets.

gear.name: ThermoWorks TimeStack Timer
gear.description: 4-channel kitchen timer — track multiple milestones in your cook simultaneously.
